headline: Akamai’s US$1.8 Billion Anthropic Cloud Deal Could Be A Game Changer For Akamai Technologies (AKAM)
summary: Akamai Technologies recently secured its largest-ever customer agreement, a US$1.80 billion, seven-year cloud infrastructure deal with AI company Anthropic, while also being removed from two Russell 1000 defensive-oriented indexes. The Anthropic partnership deepens Akamai’s role in AI-focused cloud infrastructure and could influence how investors view the balance of growth and defensiveness in its business mix. We’ll now examine how this long-term Anthropic cloud deal may reshape Akamai’s...

headline: Akamai (AKAM) Stock Could Be 25% Overvalued Following Its AI Deal
summary: Akamai Technologies stock has delivered a 48.5% return over the past year, yet both a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate and earnings multiples currently point to the shares trading at a premium to those fundamentals. A 48.5% one year return puts Akamai firmly in the winner's column, which naturally raises the question of how much of the good news is already reflected in the price. Expectations around Akamai's role in AI focused cloud infrastructure and cybersecurity can...

headline: Akamai (AKAM) Lands $1.8 Billion Cloud Deal And Joins Claroty Alliance
summary: Akamai Technologies signed a $1.8 billion, seven-year cloud computing contract with an AI startup, the largest customer agreement in the company's history. The company joined the Claroty Technology Alliances Program to expand its role in operational technology cybersecurity through microsegmentation. These moves broaden Akamai's presence in AI-focused cloud infrastructure and security for critical industrial systems. Akamai Technologies (NasdaqGS: AKAM) is making these moves while its...
